title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? VMware India Advisory Limited in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About VMware India Advisory Limited:
VMware India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India Advisory Limited!
